dialogues.text: Let's get into it. Arrival is the quest for understanding of ourselves and those around us. When mysterious alien ships touch down in locations around the globe. Louise Banks is the language professor the military turns to for help communicating with them. Alongside physicist Ian Donnelly, tasked with deciphering the aliens language, Louise begins the process of learning how to talk, but more importantly, how to think like them. She strives to overcome the barriers of time and mistrust with the aliens and her own fellow humans to avert an allout war. She must decide whether she and Ian will embark on a journey that only she knows will lead them inexorably to the pinnacles of joy and sorrow. Arrival.
